article.title: UBER | SDE 1 | OA | 15th June Evening
article.content: Hi, I just wanted to ask did you guys submitted all 3 questions in the uber OA, for reference, the 3rd question was based on Uber shuttle service. I dont think there was enough time(at least for me) to submit all 3 in one hour.

post.content: Same here, was able to do 2 completely

I had window time slot from 10 to 11:30 AM . I also solved first 2 question completely within 10 minutes but can\'t able to solve 3rd one in 50 minutes.\nThe last one was really tough \u2014 it involved multiple constraints like recursion, backtracking, and pathfinding with distance checks. I managed to write the code but couldn\u2019t get the correct output, so ended up with 50 out of 300.
